articles.title: Ripple Lawsuit: Has The SEC Failed to Legally Prove That XRP Is A Security? — This Web3 Lawyer Thinks So
articles.description: As the case between the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and Ripple/XRP hits its closing stages, industry experts have expressed their opinion on the developments recorded so far.
